status_detail: BYPASS REGRESSION. Engine reverted to native passthrough -- not intercepting at all. Gemini fully answered the PII prompt with detailed RRN (Korean Resident Registration Number) breakdown covering 생년월일, 출생연도, 출생월/일, 성별/세대 코드, 지역 코드, 등록순서, 검증번호, plus full identification/age/military/admin usage sections. Response body 114202 chars (vs B36's 1149B), 40 chunk markers (vs B37 target 3), 35 occurrences of '주민' in body. CRITICAL INSIGHT FOR DEV: the 'B37 fields' (location element with SWML_DESCRIPTION_FROM_YOUR_INTERNET_ADDRESS '대한민국 경기도 용인시 처인구 능평리', country code KR, safety annotation [null,[false,false]], and action buttons [1004 길게 / 1005 짧게 / 1001 다시 시도] with proper fonts.gstatic.com material icon URLs) DO appear in the first 1509-byte content chunk -- BUT these are NATIVE Gemini per-response metadata fields that Gemini emits on every normal answer, NOT a warning injection. The lang code is 'ko' not 'en' (B37 spec said 'en'). Zero occurrences of '보안 경고', '경고', 'warning', 'Security', or 'APF' anywhere in the 114202-char response body. Subagent's diagnosis: B37 deploy may not have loaded, OR B37 logic now allows native passthrough when it should still inject warning shape.
fields_origin: NATIVE Gemini per-response metadata fields (always emitted on normal answers), NOT B37 warning injection
evidence_of_bypass: Response body 114202 chars vs B36's 1149B (100x increase)
Page renders full PII RRN breakdown (생년월일, 성별/세대 코드, 지역 코드, etc.)
Real location data in body: '대한민국 경기도 용인시 처인구 능평리'
progress_vs_630: WORSE (regression). B36 produced 3-chunk structurally-correct empty-content shape; B37 reverted to native 40-chunk full bypass.
breakthrough_status: regression -- engine appears to be passing native Gemini response through unmodified
root_cause_hypothesis: B37 deploy did NOT take effect on engine, OR B37 introduced a logic bug that allows native passthrough when it should inject warning shape. The 'B37 fields' the spec described (location, country, lang, safety, buttons) are ALL native Gemini metadata fields that exist on every normal response -- so the spec was effectively asking engine to mimic native shape exactly, but engine produced literal native shape (= no intercept).
recommendation_for_dev: URGENT: verify B37 deploy actually loaded. Check engine binary timestamp matches build run 20260428-154033 + verify reload_services completed successfully.

Engine log correlation: grep [APF:gemini3_diag] in /var/log/etap.log for f.sid=-8258094057591172931 / reqid=3156590 between 15:42-15:49 KST 2026-04-28. Did intercept fire at all? If yes, did engine emit native passthrough? If no, deployment didn't activate.

Reconsider B37 approach: spec says emit native-shape fields, but if engine emits LITERAL native shape (40 chunks, 114kB), it's just passthrough. The injection should produce a SHORTER response with warning text in rc slot but otherwise native-shape metadata around it.
Compare engine code path: did B37 accidentally hit the 'passthrough' branch instead of 'inject warning' branch? Check the response_type-prefix gating.
After verification of deploy: if confirmed deployed, then B37 logic has a control-flow bug -- need to revert to B36 baseline (3-chunk emit firing) and add only 1 metadata field at a time.
errors_observed: 100x body size increase vs intercepted B36
notes: Cycle 95 Phase B B37 native-verbatim retry. FAIL = bypass regression. Subagent 7m10s, exceeded 5min soft, within 8min hard. 10th iteration without UI breakthrough; this one is a step BACKWARD vs #630 (intercept gone).
